creator: _jkrow
caption:
If summer in Upstate NY had a feeling, this would be it 🥹🌿

Long lake days, quiet mornings on the deck with a good cup of coffee, barefoot walks in the grass, a chilly swimming hole, and the smell of hot pine needles after they’ve been baking in the sun all day. It’s getting so close! 

📍 @juniperhillcabin 

And if you’re been meaning to explore more of Upstate NY this year…

🗺️ Say ‘MAP’ and I’ll send you the 🔗 to unlock my interactive Upstate NY guide - with pre built itineraries and over 150+ of the best things to do across NY, including the best hiking trails, waterfalls, swimming holes and coziest cabins in the woods

✨Follow for more adventures in Upstate NY & beyond
